name: thegent-utils
absorption_note: Federated crate of phenotype-infra (ADR-049). Shared utilities for thegent — the agent-runtime substrate that the thegent monorepo (KooshaPari/thegent) and downstream callers depend on. Promoted into the federation so the compute/infra service and the agent runtime share a single source of truth for agent-helper utilities.
rationale: Canonical shared-utility crate for thegent inside phenotype-infra. Pairs with the thegent substrate via the AgentUtilPort trait declared in catalog/registry.yaml. Local-only sibling — no standalone GitHub target; canonical path is phenotype-infra/crates/thegent-utils.
note: Federated crate (2026-06-24 registry sync). Tracked at the workspace-crate level so thegent-utils resolves independently. Companion artifacts (thegent, thegent-landing, thegent-workflows) are tracked separately under their existing project entries.
